subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath been received, and the servant in attendance before the Throne hath laid it before Us. We have answered thee with that which the ornaments of the world cannot equal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک و عرضه العبد الحاضر لدی العرش اجبناک بما لاتعادله زخارف العالم و
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
